[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Brot Gorrell''' was an [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] agent murdered by [[Vune Willic]] during the latter's attempt to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].

{{Char-stub}}
